title: Presto By Tower PT12046WHT Personal Sports Blender and Smoothie Maker, One Touch Switch Stainless Steel Blades,Includes a Dishwasher Proof 1 x 400 ml BPA-Free Sport Bottle, 1.2 Metre Cable, 260W White
features: POWERFUL BLENDING: 260W motor for perfectly blended drinks
SIMPLY SWITCH ON/OFF: the Presto Personal Blender's one touch switch operation means you can turn it on and off at the turn of a switch
SPORT BOTTLE: Includes a dishwasher proof 1 x 400ml BPA-free sport bottle, ideal for taking your smoothies on the go to work or the gym
BLENDER TO BOTTLE: Easily screw on the included anti-spill drinking lid to the bottle to have a smoothie made and stored for drinking in one container
2 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1 year guarantee and a 1 year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Create perfectly blended textures with ease using the Presto Personal Blender Housing a 260W motor and a durable stainless steel cutting blade, you can effortlessly blend through fruits and vegetables to create delicious soups, smoothies and dips. With a simple one touch switch to begin operation, you can easily attach the included sports bottle, ideal for taking your smoothies on the go to work or the gym. The locking mechanism activates during blending for safe and secure operation. 260W motor for perfectly blended drinks One touch switch operation means you can turn it on and off at the turn of a switch Easily screw on the included anti-spill drinking lid to the bottle to have a smoothie made and stored for drinking in one container Durable stainless steel blades for optimum performance over a long period of time Safety locking mechanism auto locks during blending to make sure the blender is secure The 1.2m length cable means you have can use safely away from the plug socket, with handy cord storage built in for easy cleaning Includes a dishwasher proof 1 x 400ml BPA-free sport bottle 260W POWER WITH 1.2M CABLE 260W powerful motor for perfectly blended drinks INCLUDES 400ML SPORTS BOTTLE Large 400ml BPA-free sports bottle with ergonomic grip ANTI-SPILL DRINKING LID Anti-spill lid ideal for the gym, work or on the go
